title: Discovery hints skip a stage — pass domain / linkedin_url when you have them
summary: company_name is the only required field, but every hint you add either sharpens Perplexity discovery (city + country_code) or skips a discovery sub-step entirely: domain skips Perplexity domain discovery and starts the crawl immediately; linkedin_url skips LinkedIn discovery and points SpiderPeople straight at the page. Skipping is cheaper and more accurate. Agents that pass only the name pay for discovery they didn't need.
references: app/schemas/company_intel.py:55-56 — domain 'skips Perplexity discovery', linkedin_url 'Known LinkedIn company URL'
app/flows/company-intel.yaml:34-41 — domain hint 'skips Perplexity domain discovery', linkedin_url 'skips Perplexity LinkedIn discovery'
windmill-scripts/spiderperplexity.py:47-69 — discovery prompt uses company_name + city/country_code location_hint
